violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The condensate line from the walk-in cooler is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Proper air gap reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023
